scripts.dev:fresh: npm run clean && NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev next dev -p 3000
scripts.db:prepare: npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: node scripts/prisma-cli.cjs db push --force-reset && node scripts/run-seed.cjs --reset
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { execFileSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const root = path.resolve(process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd()); const script = path.join(root, 'scripts', 'prisma-cli.cjs'); if (!fs.existsSync(script)) { console.log('[postinstall] Prisma runner not found, skipping generate:', script); process.exit(0); } execFileSync(process.execPath, [script, 'generate'], { cwd: root, stdio: 'inherit', env: process.env });"
